name: cascade-cost-meter
description: Local, privacy-first per-turn cost estimates for Windsurf Cascade.

commands.title: Cascade Cost Meter: Open Usage Log
Cascade Cost Meter: Show Today's Breakdown

cascadeCostMeter.showToastPerTurn.description: Show an in-IDE notification with the estimate after each Cascade turn.

cascadeCostMeter.statusBarScope.description: Whether the status bar total covers today or just this editor session.
